Name: 8Cr13MoV Rosewood Eel Knife 175 mm LKJUN10001
Short description:
Key Features

\n
    \n
  • Traditional Tokyo style Unagisaki. It is the most popular eel knife among the four Unagisaki types distributed over Japan.
    • \n
  • The knife was used exclusively for dissecting eel. Although not recommended, it can also be used to fillet other long and slim fishes.
    • \n
  • Materials used for this knife includes 8Cr13MoV steel blade, and rosewood handle. Both are tough materials that can withstand great impact.
    • \n
\n

Good for

\nEels
